calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2022 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2022 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2021 Continued To Jan-24-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF ANDREW LYNCH'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Plaintiff's motion for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. The motion is supported by the strong policy allowing liberal amendment of pleadings. Defendants do not contend that they would be prejudiced by the amendment or that plaintiff delayed unduly in seeking leave to amend. To the extent that defendants contend that plaintiff lacks standing to assert derivative claims or that the proposed amendment is otherwise subject to challenge, they may raise those arguments on demurrer or other appropriate motion. (See, e.g., California Casualty Gen. Ins. v. Superior Court (1985) 173 Cal.App.3d 274, 281 ["the preferable practice would be to permit the amendment and allow the parties to test its legal sufficiency by demurrer, motion for judgment on the pleadings or other appropriate proceedings."].) Defendants are reminded that before filing a demurrer, they are required to meet and confer with plaintiff's counsel. (Code Civ. Proc. 430.41.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2020 Set For Trial On Aug-23-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
